questions.question: What does John see coming down out of heaven?
questions.feedback: John saw the Holy City, the new Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven.

questions.question: How many gates does the new Jerusalem have?
questions.feedback: The city had twelve gates with twelve angels, and the names of the twelve tribes.

questions.question: There is a temple in the new Jerusalem.
questions.feedback: There is no temple in the city because the Lord God Almighty and the Lamb are its temple.

questions.question: God will wipe every tear from their eyes. There will be no more death or _____ or crying or pain.
questions.feedback: No more death, mourning, crying, or pain — the old order has passed away.

questions.question: He who was seated on the throne said: I am making everything _____!
questions.feedback: He who sat on the throne said: I am making everything new!
